entities.description: bookrag is a system or product being examined in the text through an ablation study and experiments
ablation study is a method used to validate the contribution of each component of bookrag
gradient based er is a method used in experiments to analyze its impact on qa performance
qa performance is the metric being evaluated in the experiments across different query types
entity resolution method is a technique compared for effectiveness in the text
case study is a specific analysis presented in the text
query types are the different categories of queries used to evaluate qa performance in the experiments
error analysis is a comprehensive method performed to examine the results of the study

relations.description: an ablation study is conducted on bookrag to validate its components
experiments on bookrag involve analyzing the impact of gradient based er
gradient based er is evaluated for its impact on qa performance
the effectiveness of the entity resolution method is compared in the context of bookrag
a case study is presented as part of the examination of bookrag
experiments on bookrag are conducted across different query types
a comprehensive error analysis is performed as part of the examination of bookrag
